cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu tak, aby nakreslila [hlp]schodovitou spirálu[/hlp]. Kreslí se 3 páry čar, každý pár je delší: nejprve 20 px, pak 40 px a nakonec 60 px. Mezi každou čarou se otočte vpravo o 90°. Celkem 6 čar a 5 otočení.
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml:
<xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml">
  <block type="turtle_forward" x="20" y="20">
    <field name="DISTANCE">20</field>
    <next>
      <block type="turtle_right">
        <field name="ANGLE">90</field>
        <next>
          <block type="turtle_forward">
            <field name="DISTANCE">20</field>
            <next>
              <block type="turtle_right">
                <field name="ANGLE">90</field>
                <next>
                  <block type="turtle_forward">
                    <field name="DISTANCE">40</field>
                    <next>
                      <block type="turtle_right">
                        <field name="ANGLE">90</field>
                        <next>
                          <block type="turtle_forward">
                            <field name="DISTANCE">40</field>
                            <next>
                              <block type="turtle_right">
                                <field name="ANGLE">90</field>
                                <next>
                                  <block type="turtle_forward">
                                    <field name="DISTANCE">60</field>
                                    <next>
                                      <block type="turtle_right">
                                        <field name="ANGLE">90</field>
                                        <next>
                                          <block type="turtle_forward">
                                            <field name="DISTANCE">60</field>
                                          </block>
                                        </next>
                                      </block>
                                    </next>
                                  </block>
                                </next>
                              </block>
                            </next>
                          </block>
                        </next>
                      </block>
                    </next>
                  </block>
                </next>
              </block>
            </next>
          </block>
        </next>
      </block>
    </next>
  </block>
</xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
